## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and link building efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is improving, with clicks nearly doubling compared to last week](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [29 articles published so far, with 8 more coming this week; glossary pages pending technical fixes](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Link building efforts progressing well, with 15 backlinks in progress or completed](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [SEO ranking improvements observed for multiple keywords, particularly for ad format content](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Statistics article on AI marketing created using data from 3 recent reports](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Additional statistics topics identified: mobile marketing, Gen Z marketing, experiential marketing, inbound marketing](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Ad format articles performing well; Instagram and Snapchat formats coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [29 articles published, 8 more this week; glossary pages pending technical fixes](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [SEMrush position tracking shows improvements, with several keywords in top 10 positions](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [15 backlinks in progress or completed, including high-authority sites like Hagen and Firework](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [Initial month: \~2/3 GrowthX network, 1/3 external; aiming for more external links in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Target: 15-20 high domain authority backlinks per month (DA 30+)](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Balancing link profile with mix of authority levels to appear natural](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

### SEO and CRO Recommendations

  - [Maintain certain URLs during site migration to preserve link juice](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Implement CRO elements on blog (currently lacking)](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Consider creating lead magnets and calculators for higher conversion rates (0.5-2% typical)](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

### Miscellaneous Updates

  - [Evan working on comprehensive DTC influencer list for outreach](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Deepak to follow up on glossary page technical fixes by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

  - [Team to consider implementing CRO elements on the blog](https://fathom.video/share/EVsQWyRxbG5pGx9-4chxegVF9skLRnB5?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
